CustomField.description: Short agency abbreviation used as the default nepa_lead_agency__c value when NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator creates a permit instance from this type (e.g., USACE, EPA, USFWS, FERC, BLM, NPS). Complements IssuingDepartmentId (RegulatoryAuthority lookup) with a display-ready text label.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Default issuing agency abbreviation for permits of this type (e.g., USACE, EPA, USFWS). Used when creating permit instance records.
CustomField.label: Default Lead Agency
